rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, BY AND THROUGH, VS. CARL ERNST JR
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 4, 2010, line 12, DEFENDANT CARL ERNST'S MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT. DENIED, EXCEPT MOTION GRANTED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO PARAGRAPH 2 OF PRAYER, PAGE 3, LINE 15, FOR UNPAID PAST-DUE RENT UNDER THE LEASE ACCORDING TO PROOF. RENT IS RECOVERABLE ONLY WHEN PROCEEDING ON THE BASIS OF CCP SECTION 1166(b) FOR DEFAULT IN THE PAYMENT OF RENT. SABERI V. BAKHTIARI (1985) 169 CAL.APP.3D 509. PLAINTIFF MUST AMEND TO PRAY FOR DAMAGES FROM THE TIME OF TERMINATION OF THE TENANCY THROUGH THE TIME THAT DEFENDANT ALLEGEDLY UNLAWFULLY DETAINED. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, BY AND THROUGH, VS. CARL ERNST JR
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, August 4, 2010, line 12, DEFENDANT CARL ERNST'S DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. =(302/CWW)
